subcodes.first_line: O Lord, Refuge of the sincere ones, Shelter of them that believe in Thy unity, and Haven of the fearful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا ملجاء المخلصین و ملاذ الموحدین و کهف الخائفین
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
